lang.JpRailBookingPg_FAQ_A12:
1. Includes but is not limited to the following routes:
Tokyo - Shin-Osaka / Kyoto / Nagoya / Narita Airport / Sendai / Yamagata / Hakodate / Aomori (etc.)

2. Order Confirmation
Most of the orders will be confirmed immediately. After the order is confirmed, please go to "Orders" on the KKday app to see the QR code.
If you make a reservation more than 30 days before the travel date, the order will be confirmed 30 days before the travel date. After the order is confirmed, please go to "Orders" on the KKday app to see the QR code.

3. Ticket Pickup
a. Go to "Orders" on the KKday app to see the QR code.
b. Go to the departure station and scan the QR code to pick up a physical ticket (1 Basic Fare Ticket + 1 Limited Express Ticket).
c. Look for a ticket vending machine/counter marked with the green symbol "えきねっと" to pick up your ticket.

From JR East stations (Tokyo, Sendai, Nagano, Niigata, etc.): Pick up your ticket at an automated ticketing machine/counter. To pick up a ticket from an automated machine, click on the icon in the lower right corner of the screen and scan the QR code.
From JR Tokai Station (Shin-Osaka, Kyoto, Nagoya, etc.): Go to the JR Tokai Ticket Office and pick up your ticket from a QR code machine.
From JR Hokuriku Station (Kanazawa, Itoigawa, etc.): Scan the QR code at the ticket machine at the JR Ticket Office to pick up your ticket.
Fom JR Hokkaido Line stations (Shin-Hakodate-Hokuto, etc.): Pick up your ticket at an automated ticket machine. Tickets cannot be picked up at JR West automated ticket machines/counters.
If you cannot scan the QR code, enter the 17-code order number (e.g., 22522325896521211).

lang.vTransAT_Policy_WaitPolicyPIckup_Fmt: The driver will provide {{NUM}}  of grace period based on the actual flight arrival time. lang.OrderDetailPg_JapanRail_QaqAns11:
・Includes but is not limited to the following routes: Tokyo - Shin-Osaka / Kyoto / Nagoya / Narita Airport / Sendai / Yamagata / Hakodate / Aomori (etc.)

・Order Confirmation
Most of the orders will be confirmed immediately. After the order is confirmed, please go to ""Orders"" on the KKday app to see the QR code.
If you make a reservation more than 30 days before the travel date, the order will be confirmed 30 days before the travel date. After the order is confirmed, please go to ""Orders"" on the KKday app to see the QR code.

・Ticket Pickup
a. Go to ""Orders"" on the KKday app to see the QR code.
b. Go to the departure station and scan the QR code to pick up a physical ticket (1 Basic Fare Ticket + 1 Limited Express Ticket).
c. Look for a ticket vending machine/counter marked with the green symbol ""えきねっと"" to pick up your ticket.

From JR East stations (Tokyo, Sendai, Nagano, Niigata, etc.): Pick up your ticket at an automated ticketing machine/counter. To pick up a ticket from an automated machine, click on the icon in the lower right corner of the screen and scan the QR code.
From JR Tokai Station (Shin-Osaka, Kyoto, Nagoya, etc.): Go to the JR Tokai Ticket Office and pick up your ticket from a QR code machine.
From JR Hokuriku Station (Kanazawa, Itoigawa, etc.): Scan the QR code at the ticket machine at the JR Ticket Office to pick up your ticket.
Fom JR Hokkaido Line stations (Shin-Hakodate-Hokuto, etc.): Pick up your ticket at an automated ticket machine.
Tickets cannot be picked up at JR West automated ticket machines/counters.
If you cannot scan the QR code, enter the 17-code order number (e.g., 22522325896521268).

prodInfo.desc: Great care is taken to ensure guests experience comfort through top-notch services and amenities. Wh
prodInfo.feature: Great care is taken to ensure guests experience comfort through top-notch services and amenities. When arriving by car, you'll be grateful for the on-site complimentary parking at resort villa.The resort villa offers reception amenities including luggage storage and safety deposit boxes to ensure a comfortable stay for guests. The resort villa's daily housekeeping ensures an excellent option for your stay.To ensure the well-being and convenience of all visitors, smoking is strictly prohibited throughout the entire resort villa. Smoking is permitted solely in the specified smoking zones allocated by resort villa. In order to ensure the utmost level of relaxation, the guestrooms feature an inviting design and are equipped with all basic necessities, creating a delightful stay experience. To ensure a pleasant stay, a selection of rooms at resort villa come furnished with linen service and air conditioning, all designed with your ease in mind.Several chosen accommodations at Glamprook Shimanami have a balcony or terrace incorporated into the room design.Understanding the significance of bathroom facilities in enhancing visitor contentment, resort villa offers a hair dryer, toiletries and towels within a few chosen chambers. Start your day stress-free at Glamprook Shimanami as breakfast is made available for you on the premises.How about kicking off each day of your getaway with a delicious cup of coffee? At the pension, relish in the invigorating taste of a freshly brewed, excellent coffee. Various excellent meal offerings at pension ensure that enticing and easily accessible options are constantly available.
